summary: Good coverage of happy path with 20 test cases across all main functions (Get-SecretStatus, Get-RotationReport, Format-RotationReport, Invoke-SecretRotationValidator) and both output formats (Markdown, JSON). Test organization is clear with descriptive names and TDD phase comments. However, rigor is weak: missing edge cases (boundary conditions like exactly 14 days, negative rotation days, zero days until expiry), no invalid input validation (malformed dates, null fields, empty arrays), no large dataset testing. Design is strong (good fixtures, isolation, readability) but could benefit from scenario-based fixtures beyond the single SampleSecrets set. The suite would catch basic regressions but miss bugs in error handling and edge cases critical for a production secret rotation validator.
